notes: Cleaned up Library Cards rows and empty meal photo placeholders
Improved meal card preview spacing so long food names do not collide with calorie values
Simplified meal card export actions to a single Save / Share PNG button
Unified meal card titles and labels across both card formats
Added serving portion support for food entries
Fixed journal calendar photo counts so day boxes stay fixed height
Clarified per-serving food logging UI and portion badges
Grouped food log calories and macros into one per-serving panel
Unified Additional Information spacing and fixed macro input focus
Added a read-only live logged-total preview for serving portions
